creator: juha.o.ylitalo@nokia.com
text:
Port in net/citrix-ica is based on idea that users download Linux tarball version from ICA Client 6.0.908 into their /usr/ports/distfiles.  That tarball used to be available from citrix.com, but they have appearantly done new Citrix ICA client version (6.20.973).

Installation on new package looks pretty much same as 6.0.908, BUT if you try to cheat system by removing distinfo from net/citrix-ica and putting version 6.20.973 tarball into /usr/ports/distfiles/citrix_ica, it will fail to make successful installation.
